_comment: Route-3926 single-patient expanded access. Derived from docs/route-3926-submission-spec.md. Intake fields are shared; the two routes differ by pathway (emergency vs non-emergency) and the clocks they arm. Nothing here authorizes a reserved act; gates fail closed in engine/registry/gates.json.

intake_fields.label: Coded patient identifier / initials
intake_fields.help: A code or initials only. Never a name, MRN, DOB, or other direct identifier (Constitution HC2 / privacy).

intake_fields.label: Age
intake_fields.help: As clinically needed.

intake_fields.label: Sex
intake_fields.help: As clinically needed.

intake_fields.label: Diagnosis (serious / immediately life-threatening)
intake_fields.help: State stage/severity concisely. The condition must be serious or immediately life-threatening.

intake_fields.label: No comparable / satisfactory alternative therapy — basis
intake_fields.help: Why approved therapies are exhausted, contraindicated, or unavailable for this patient.

intake_fields.label: Prior therapies tried / failed
intake_fields.help: Agents, dates, and outcomes.

intake_fields.label: Physician name
intake_fields.help: The requesting physician who becomes the sponsor-investigator of the single-patient IND.

intake_fields.label: Degrees
intake_fields.help: e.g. MD, DO.

intake_fields.label: Address
intake_fields.help: Mailing address for the sponsor-investigator contact block.

intake_fields.label: Medical license number
intake_fields.help: For the physician qualification statement.

intake_fields.label: §312.310(a) determination (probable risk from drug ≤ probable risk from disease)
intake_fields.help: The physician's attestation. OSSICRO records this determination; it never makes it.

intake_fields.label: Dose
intake_fields.help: Dose and formulation.

intake_fields.label: Treatment + monitoring plan
intake_fields.help: Baseline and on-treatment assessments, toxicity grading, response assessment, follow-up.

intake_fields.label: Benefit-justifies-risk rationale
intake_fields.help: Evidence (mechanism, trial data, case experience) that potential benefit justifies potential risk in this disease.

intake_fields.label: Non-interference-with-investigations basis
intake_fields.help: Why supplying the drug will not interfere with clinical investigations supporting approval.

intake_fields.label: Clinical rationale (the §312.305(a) core narrative)
intake_fields.help: The substantive core: seriousness, absence of alternative, and benefit-justifies-risk, in the physician's words.

intake_fields.label: Treatment-plan identifier (for the consent form)
intake_fields.help: A local identifier for this single-patient treatment plan (there is no trial protocol number in expanded access). Feeds the consent form's protocol-identifier field.

intake_fields.label: Treatment-plan version
intake_fields.help: e.g. 1.0 (the form adds the 'v'). Feeds the consent form's version field so amendments are traceable.

intake_fields.label: Manufacturer name
intake_fields.help: The IND/DMF holder who must decide whether to supply and grant an LOA.

intake_fields.label: Manufacturer address
intake_fields.help: For the LOA letterhead block.

intake_fields.label: IND / DMF number to cross-reference
intake_fields.help: The application number the LOA lets FDA cross-reference for CMC / nonclinical data.

intake_fields.label: Manufacturer has an IND on file?
intake_fields.help: If NO, the physician must contact the FDA division to determine required supporting information in lieu of an LOA.

intake_fields.label: FDA-division contact (if no IND on file)
intake_fields.help: Documented contact with the review division about the supporting information FDA needs. Required only when no IND is on file.

intake_fields.label: Supply commitment received?
intake_fields.help: OSSICRO records this fact; it never assumes or compels supply.

intake_fields.label: IRB phone
intake_fields.help: For the consent form 'whom to contact' element.

intake_fields.label: §56.105 chair-concurrence pathway elected?
intake_fields.help: Requests IRB-chair (or designated member) concurrence in lieu of a convened full board (Form 3926 Field 10.b).

intake_fields.label: Emergency request?
intake_fields.help: If the patient must be treated before a written submission can be made. Selects the emergency pathway and its clocks.

intake_fields.label: FDA telephone-authorization date (emergency)
intake_fields.help: Arms the 15-working-day written-3926 clock.

intake_fields.label: First-treatment date (emergency)
intake_fields.help: Arms the 5-working-day IRB-notification clock.

intake_fields.label: FDA receipt date of the 3926 (non-emergency)
intake_fields.help: Arms the 30-calendar-day IND-effective clock. If left blank, the clock stays unarmed until this date is entered.

intake_fields.label: Initial or follow-up
intake_fields.help: Form 3926 Field 2.

intake_fields.label: Target: new IND vs existing IND
intake_fields.help: New assigns a fresh IND number; existing files as a serial amendment.

intake_fields.label: Existing IND number (if follow-up / existing IND)
intake_fields.help: Leave blank for a new individual-patient IND (FDA assigns the number).

intake_fields.label: FDA review division (cover-letter addressee)
intake_fields.help: The division holding the manufacturer's IND, or CDER/CBER central receipt if unknown.

intake_fields.label: Waiver 10.a (§312.10 — waive 1571/1572 requirements)
intake_fields.help: Physician attestation. Never defaulted or auto-checked by OSSICRO.

intake_fields.label: Waiver 10.b (§56.105 — chair concurrence in lieu of convened IRB)
intake_fields.help: Physician attestation. Never defaulted or auto-checked by OSSICRO.

intake_fields.label: Consent: research statement / purpose
intake_fields.help: Feeds the drafted ICF. The consent EVENT is non-delegable.

intake_fields.label: Treatment facility / site name
intake_fields.help: Where treatment is administered.

ectd_map.title: Regional administrative (US): cover letter, Form 3926, LOA
Summaries — not required for single-patient EA
Quality (CMC) — cross-referenced from the manufacturer IND/DMF via the LOA
Nonclinical — cross-referenced from the manufacturer IND via the LOA
Clinical: treatment plan, IRB concurrence, informed consent

clocks.label: IND effective (non-emergency)
clocks.note: IND goes into effect when FDA notifies the physician it may proceed, or absent notification 30 calendar days after FDA receives the completed 3926.

ectd_map.title: Regional administrative (US): cover letter, Form 3926, LOA
Summaries — not required for single-patient EA
Quality (CMC) — cross-referenced from the manufacturer IND/DMF via the LOA
Nonclinical — cross-referenced from the manufacturer IND via the LOA
Clinical: treatment plan, IRB concurrence, informed consent

clocks.label: Written 3926 after emergency phone authorization
clocks.note: The physician must submit the written Form 3926 within 15 working days of the FDA telephone authorization.

clocks.label: IRB notification after emergency treatment
clocks.note: For emergency use, treatment may proceed before IRB review provided the IRB is notified within 5 working days of the treatment.
